title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
summary: Apple is expanding AI capabilities across Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps to assist with sentence completion, photo editing, and workflow automation. These features leverage machine learning to help users complete tasks more efficiently.
content: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.

zh.title: Apple 刚刚教会你的 iPhone 完成你的句子、你的照片和你的工作流程
zh.summary: Apple 正在扩展 Safari、Shortcuts 和 Password 应用中的 AI 功能，协助完成句子、编辑照片和工作流程自动化。这些功能利用机器学习帮助用户更高效地完成任务。

title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
summary: Apple kicked off WWDC 2026 with major announcements including Siri AI enhancements, iOS 27, and Apple Intelligence features, along with developer events throughout the week. The event is historically significant as it marks CEO Tim Cook's final keynote with the company.
content: Apple’s WWDC 2026 event kicked off this morning at 10 a.m. PT at Apple Park, starting a week full of expected announcements around Siri, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more, along with developer events and demos. This year’s event is particularly notable for a couple things. It marks CEO Tim Cook’s last with the company, […]

zh.title: WWDC 2026：关于 Siri AI、iOS 27、Apple Intelligence 等的所有公告
zh.summary: Apple 在 WWDC 2026 推出了重大公告，包括 Siri AI 增强功能、iOS 27 和 Apple Intelligence 特性，以及整周的开发者活动。这次活动具有历史意义，因为它标志着 CEO Tim Cook 在公司的最后一次主题演讲。

title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
summary: Apple is enhancing the Shortcuts app with AI capabilities that allow users to create workflows by describing what they want in plain language. This natural language approach makes automation significantly more accessible to non-technical users.
content: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.

zh.title: Apple 将允许你在新的 Shortcuts 应用中使用 AI 构建工作流程
zh.summary: Apple 正在增强 Shortcuts 应用，提供 AI 功能让用户通过自然语言描述来创建工作流程。这种自然语言方法使自动化对非技术用户更加易于使用。

title: Apple WWDC 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
summary: Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote delivered seven major announcements, including a significant AI overhaul of Siri powered by Apple Intelligence developed with Google. The updates span iPhone, iPad, and Mac operating systems with expanded personalization capabilities.
content:
Apple's keynote at this year's Worldwide Developers Conference was a big one. After months of delays, Apple reintroduced us to its AI-upgraded Siri, which will go beyond what the existing voice assistant can do by offering more personalized help. We also got a look at many other updates coming across the operating systems powering the iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
You can catch up with all the biggest news in the roundup below.
Siri's big AI revamp
Siri is getting a bunch of AI features powered by the latest version of Apple Intelligence, which Apple worked with Google to build. Apple is calling the upgraded voice assistant Siri AI, offering the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple WWDC 2026：七大重磅公告
zh.summary: Apple WWDC 2026主题演讲发布了七项重大公告，包括由Google合作开发的Apple Intelligence驱动的Siri重大AI改革。这些更新涵盖iPhone、iPad和Mac操作系统，并提供了扩展的个性化功能。

title: WWDC 2026 bonus live blog: Tech Talk with Craig Federighi
summary: Apple is hosting an on-the-record technical deep dive with SVP of Software Engineering Craig Federighi to discuss the new architecture behind Apple Intelligence. The session covers how the revamped Apple Intelligence powers updates across all Apple operating systems.
content:
One of the funnier parts of the keynote.	

Fresh off the WWDC keynote presentation, The Verge has been invited to an "on-the-record technical deep dive into the bold new architecture enabling Apple Intelligence capabilities." Apple SVP of Software Engineering Craig Federighi and his team will be there, and so will we. 
The revamped Apple Intelligence is at the heart of nearly every update Apple announced across all its operating systems today, Liquid Glass corner radii notwithstanding. 
The discussion will begin at 12PM PT / 3PM ET. Nilay and Vee will be liveblogging below; Allison will be quickposting.

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: WWDC 2026额外直播：与Craig Federighi的技术讲座
zh.summary: Apple正举办与软件工程高级副总裁Craig Federighi的公开技术深度讨论，探讨Apple Intelligence背后的新架构。该讨论介绍了经过改进的Apple Intelligence如何为所有Apple操作系统的更新提供支持。

title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
summary: Apple is improving its Image Playground AI image generator with enhancements designed to boost its competitiveness in the growing AI-generated imagery space. The updated tool aims to deliver better results and user experience.
content: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.

zh.title: Apple的Image Playground不再糟糕了
zh.summary: Apple正在改进其Image Playground AI图像生成器，这些改进旨在提升其在快速增长的AI生成图像市场中的竞争力。这个更新的工具旨在提供更好的结果和用户体验。

title: Cameras get an Apple Intelligence boost in Apple Home
summary: Apple is integrating Apple Intelligence into the Home app's camera features, enabling AI-powered video analysis, automatic descriptions, and natural language search across connected cameras. Users can find relevant clips and noteworthy moments across their home with these new capabilities.
content:
Cameras in Apple Home will be able to use Apple Intelligence to get AI-powered features such as video descriptions and natural language search. | Screenshot by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Apple Intelligence is coming to cameras connected to Apple Home. At WWDC, Apple announced that with iOS27, the Home app will use Apple Intelligence to analyze footage and generate descriptions summarizing what the camera saw. You can also search footage with natural language to find clips from across connected cameras, such as when a package was delivered. 
The Home app will also use Apple Intelligence to connect relevant clips together to give you a picture of what's happening across your home, and surface "noteworthy clips" on the search page to quickly show you videos that might be important.
This AI boost is similar to f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 摄像头在Apple Home中获得Apple Intelligence增强
zh.summary: Apple正在将Apple Intelligence集成到Home应用的摄像头功能中，启用AI驱动的视频分析、自动描述和跨连接摄像头的自然语言搜索。用户可以通过这些新功能在家中找到相关的视频片段和重要时刻。

title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
summary: Apple is adding AI-powered editing capabilities to the Photos app, including a new "Reframe" feature that uses spatial intelligence to automatically adjust photo perspectives. This enhancement makes advanced photo editing more accessible to casual users.
content: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.

zh.title: Apple的照片应用获得新的AI编辑功能
zh.summary: Apple正在向照片应用添加AI驱动的编辑功能，包括一个新的"重新构图"功能，该功能使用空间智能来自动调整照片视角。这一增强使高级照片编辑对普通用户更加易于使用。

title: Apple gives Siri its own dedicated app
summary: Apple is launching a dedicated Siri app, marking a significant step toward establishing Siri as a more prominent and accessible assistant. The standalone app expands Siri's functionality beyond voice-activated controls.
content: Siri is finally getting its own app.

zh.title: Apple为Siri提供了独立应用
zh.summary: Apple正在推出一个专门的Siri应用，这是建立Siri成为更突出和易访问助手的重要一步。独立应用将Siri的功能扩展到语音控制之外。

title: Apple announces visionOS 27 with Siri AI
summary: Apple announced visionOS 27 featuring an updated Siri AI assistant accessible through a dedicated app and visual intelligence capabilities for Vision Pro users. The update also introduces faster Wi-Fi connectivity, new widget sizes, and support for immersive panoramic scenes.
content:
Along with new software for Macs and iPhones, Apple announced visionOS 27 during its keynote presentation at WWDC on Monday. Like its other platforms, visionOS 27 will feature Apple's updated Siri AI assistant and the new dedicated Siri app. While wearing the Vision Pro, you can use visual intelligence to ask Siri  "about anything in your physical or digital space, instantly."
It will also support using the panoramas you've photographed as immersive scenes and environments in visionOS. Apple said the Vision Pro will be able to connect to Wi-Fi "up to 3x faster," and a new "extra-small" widget size will allow more customizations. When you ge …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple 宣布推出配备 Siri AI 的 visionOS 27
zh.summary: Apple 宣布推出 visionOS 27，该系统搭载经过更新的 Siri AI 助手，可通过专用应用程序访问，并为 Vision Pro 用户提供视觉智能功能。此次更新还引入了更快的 Wi-Fi 连接、新的小部件尺寸以及沉浸式全景场景支持。

title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature
summary: Apple is adding a Siri-powered Camera feature that simplifies bill splitting by allowing users to photograph a bill and automatically calculate their share for payment via Apple Cash. This practical feature leverages Siri's enhanced AI capabilities for everyday transactions.
content: "If you're grabbing a bite with friends and point your iPhone at the bill, then [you can] select what you ordered to split the tab with Apple Cash," said Apple VP of Software Sebastien Marineau-Mes.

zh.title: Apple 通过新的相机 Siri 功能解决分账难题
zh.summary: Apple 推出了由 Siri 驱动的相机功能，用户可以拍摄账单照片，该功能会自动计算用户需支付的金额，并可通过 Apple Cash 支付。这一实用功能利用 Siri 增强的 AI 能力处理日常交易。

title: Apple puts parents back in control of kids’ iPhone use
summary: Apple is enhancing parental controls with more granular screen time management features, giving parents improved tools to oversee and regulate their children's iPhone usage. These expanded controls offer greater flexibility and specificity in managing device access.
content: Apple is putting control back into the hands of parents with more granular screen time features.

zh.title: Apple 让家长重新掌控孩子的 iPhone 使用
zh.summary: Apple 正在增强家长控制功能，提供更细粒度的屏幕时间管理功能，给予家长更好的工具来监督和调节孩子的 iPhone 使用情况。这些扩展控制功能为管理设备访问提供了更大的灵活性和具体性。

title: Apple’s Health app can now tell you if you’re in perimenopause
summary: Apple is expanding the Health app's cycle tracking feature to detect and alert users to patterns suggestive of perimenopause. This addition addresses an important health monitoring need for women tracking reproductive health changes.
content: Cycle tracker will now notify women when their cycle patterns are suggestive of perimenopause.

zh.title: 苹果健康应用现在可以检测你是否处于围绝经期
zh.summary: 苹果正在扩展健康应用的周期追踪功能，以检测并提醒用户围绝经期的征兆。这一新增功能满足了女性监测生殖健康变化的重要需求。

title: Apple introduces systemwide dictation
summary: Apple is launching a system-wide dictation feature that operates across all apps and services, positioning itself as a competitor to existing solutions like Whisper Flow. This integrated dictation capability aims to make voice input more seamless throughout the OS.
content: Apple's new dictation system could compete with Wispr Flow and others.

zh.title: 苹果推出系统级语音听写功能
zh.summary: 苹果正在推出一项系统范围的语音听写功能，可在所有应用和服务中使用，与Whisper Flow等现有解决方案竞争。这一集成的听写功能旨在使整个操作系统的语音输入更加无缝。

title: Apple’s long-awaited AI Siri overhaul is finally here
summary: Apple has completed its long-awaited overhaul of Siri, transforming it from a simple voice-controlled assistant into a full-featured AI companion capable of more advanced and personalized interactions. This evolution represents a significant shift in Apple's approach to virtual assistants.
content: The idea behind the new "Siri AI" is to turn the assistant from a voice controlled assistant into an AI companion that can do a lot more.

zh.title: 苹果期待已久的AI Siri大改造终于推出
zh.summary: 苹果完成了期待已久的Siri大改造，将其从简单的语音控制助手转变为功能完整的AI伙伴，能够进行更高级和个性化的交互。这一演变代表了苹果在虚拟助手方面方法的重大转变。

title: Massachusetts votes to pass new privacy rights bill that bans sale of precise location data
summary: Massachusetts is passing a new privacy rights bill that will ban companies from selling people's precise location data across the state. This marks a significant regulatory step to protect consumer privacy from commercial data brokers.
content: The bill is expected to blanket ban companies and startups from selling people's precise location data across the state.

zh.title: 马萨诸塞州投票通过新隐私权法案，禁止出售精确位置数据
zh.summary: 马萨诸塞州正在通过一项新的隐私权法案，该法案将禁止公司在全州范围内出售人们的精确位置数据。这标志着保护消费者隐私免受商业数据经纪人侵害的重要监管举措。

title: Uber tells London to get ready for robotaxis
summary: Uber is launching robotaxis in London using Wayve's autonomous vehicles, opening an interest list for early riders. This expansion beyond the US and China tests whether driverless ridehailing has appetite in a major international market.
content:
Uber is getting ready to put robotaxis on London's streets, opening an interest list for riders who want to be among the first to hail one of Wayve's autonomous vehicles when the service goes live later this year. The rollout would be a milestone in one of Uber's biggest markets and an early test of whether there's appetite for driverless ridehailing beyond the US and China, where robotaxis are already carrying passengers.
The company is asking Londoners to show their interest in being among the first public passengers in its co-branded Uber x Wayve driverless cars. In the Uber app settings, customers can sign up by selecting "join interest …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Uber告诉伦敦为机器人出租车做好准备
zh.summary: Uber正在使用Wayve的自动驾驶汽车在伦敦推出机器人出租车，并为早期乘客开放兴趣列表。这次超越美国和中国的扩张测试了无人驾驶打车服务在主要国际市场中是否具有吸引力。

title: The weather and climate science AI revolution isn’t revolutionary
summary: Machine learning has significant applications in weather and climate science, but its capabilities have practical limits despite recent hype. The technology augments existing methods rather than revolutionizing the field.
content: Machine learning has its limits—how is it being used?

zh.title: 天气和气候科学AI革命并非真正革命性的
zh.summary: 机器学习在天气和气候科学中有重要应用，但尽管最近炒作很多，其能力有实际限制。该技术是对现有方法的增强而非彻底改革该领域。

title: Uber, Wayve and Waymo are headed towards a robotaxi showdown in London
summary: Uber, Wayve, and Waymo are competing to establish robotaxi services in London, with Uber customers now able to join an interest list for Wayve autonomous vehicles. This three-way competition signals accelerating autonomous vehicle deployment in the UK market.
content: Uber customers in the UK can now join an interest list to increase their chances of being matched with a Wayve robotaxi.

zh.title: 优步、Wayve和Waymo将在伦敦展开无人出租车大战
zh.summary: 优步、Wayve和Waymo正在竞争在伦敦建立无人出租车服务，优步用户现在可以加入Wayve自动驾驶汽车的关注列表。这三方竞争表明英国市场上自动驾驶汽车的部署正在加速。

title: WWDC 2026: How to watch and what to expect
summary: Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference keynote is on June 8th at 1PM ET, featuring announcements on iOS, macOS, and other operating systems with a potential major Siri overhaul. The event streams live on YouTube and Apple's website.
content:
Apple's biggest event of the year is nearly here. The company's Worldwide Developers Conference will spotlight updates to iOS, macOS, and all of Apple's other operating systems, and this year's event could also include a major overhaul for Siri. Here's how you can watch along live.
When WWDC will happen and where you can watch it
WWDC lasts a few days, but Apple's biggest announcements will be in the keynote presentation on June 8th at 1PM ET / 10AM PT. The full presentation usually lasts a couple of hours. You can watch it live on YouTube or from Apple's website. 
What to expect from Apple's WWDC keynote
Apple's annual OS updates. WWDC …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: WWDC 2026：如何观看及期待内容
zh.summary: 苹果全球开发者大会主题演讲将于6月8日美国东部时间下午1点举行，将发布iOS、macOS和其他操作系统的公告，并可能进行重大的Siri改版。该活动将在YouTube和苹果官网上进行直播。
